description: Django management command script for seeding demo defect data with 5-Why analyses and corrective actions into a defect management system.

classes.name: _SeedDefect
classes.description: Data class representing a defect seed template with all necessary attributes for demo data creation.

methods.name: _get_or_seed_statuses
methods.description: Ensures required workflow statuses exist in the system, creating them if necessary.

methods.name: _days_ago
methods.description: Returns a datetime object representing a number of days ago from now.

methods.name: _days_from_now
methods.description: Returns a datetime object representing a number of days from now.

methods.name: _make_history
methods.description: Creates a defect history record for tracking status changes or events.

methods.name: _seed_defects
methods.description: Provides a list of predefined defect templates with detailed attributes for demo seeding.

methods.name: handle
methods.description: Main method executing the seeding process, optionally resetting existing demo defects, and creating new defect records with associated analyses and actions.
